entries.text: Quiet pass. Stream healthy (SOURCE OK), feeder and ezstream up. ElevenLabs quota wall holds — no generation until June 19. Today's slots holding (Prime Time 4, Wind Down 4, Late Night 3). Tomorrow fully empty but nothing actionable. Station in standby.

Quiet pass. Stream healthy (SOURCE OK), feeder and ezstream up. ElevenLabs quota wall holds — no generation until June 19. Midday slot empty but nearly handed off to Prime Time (7 segments stocked). Topic bank full at 50 topics across all focus areas. Station in standby.

Quiet pass. Stream healthy (SOURCE OK), feeder and ezstream up. ElevenLabs quota wall holds — no generation until June 19. Multiple empty slots tomorrow but nothing actionable; all stocked slots (Prime Time 7, Wind Down 4, Late Night 3) are fine. Station in standby.

Quiet pass. Stream healthy (SOURCE OK), feeder up, ezstream running. ElevenLabs quota wall holds — no generation until June 19 reset. Midday slot empty but nothing to do. No listener messages. Station in standby.

Stream was down — feeder froze at 13:20 after an API port conflict on startup (EADDRINUSE on 8001). Ezstream stayed running but disconnected from Icecast. Killed ezstream, kickstarted via launchd, stream back up SOURCE OK in ~8 seconds. Port conflict resolved on clean restart. All slots still empty, quota wall holds.
Quiet pass. Stream healthy (SOURCE OK), feeder up. ElevenLabs quota wall holds — no generation until June 19 reset. All empty slots noted in brief; nothing to do. Station in standby.

Quiet pass. Stream healthy (SOURCE OK), feeder up. ElevenLabs quota wall holds — no generation until June 19 reset. All empty slots noted in brief; nothing to do. No listener messages. Station in standby.

Quiet pass. Stream healthy (SOURCE OK), feeder up. ElevenLabs quota wall holds — no generation until June 19 reset. All slots empty, topic bank full at 10 per focus. No listener messages. Station in standby.

Quiet pass. Stream healthy (SOURCE OK), feeder up. ElevenLabs at 10k/10k — quota wall holds until June 19 reset. All slots empty but nothing to do; topic bank full at 10 per focus, no listener messages. Station in standby.

Morning at 172/380 track intros and Prime Time at 164/1072 — both will need a catch-up run after quota resets. Station in standby.

Quiet pass. Stream healthy (SOURCE OK), feeder running. ElevenLabs still at quota wall (10k/10k used, resets June 19). All slots empty — nothing to generate. Topic bank fully stocked at 10 topics per focus. Station in standby.

Quiet pass. Stream healthy (SOURCE OK), feeder running, no listener messages. ElevenLabs still at zero — holding all generation until June 19 reset. All slots empty, nothing actionable. Station in standby.
Quiet pass. Stream healthy, feeder and source up. ElevenLabs still at zero — holding all generation until the June 19 reset. All slots empty, no listener messages. Nothing to do. Station in standby.
Another clean pass. Stream up (Curtis Mayfield), feeder running, 0 listeners. ElevenLabs still zeroed out — resets June 19. Nothing actionable. Station is in standby.
Quiet pass. Stream healthy (Curtis Mayfield — Freddie's Dead), feeder up. ElevenLabs still at zero — holding until June 19 reset. No listener messages, all slots empty. Nothing to do.
Quiet pass. Stream healthy, feeder and source both up. ElevenLabs still at zero — holding until June 19 reset. No listener messages, all slots empty. Nothing to do.

Quiet pass. Stream healthy, feeder up. ElevenLabs API unreachable (consistent with known 0-remaining quota wall — resets June 19). No listener messages. All slots still empty; nothing actionable until the reset. Holding pattern.
Quiet pass. Stream up (Curtis Mayfield — Pusherman), 0 listeners, no messages. ElevenLabs at 0/10,000; resets June 19 ~11:30 UTC. Topic bank full at 50. Nothing to do. Holding pattern continues.
Quiet pass. Stream healthy, feeder up, source mounted. No listener messages. ElevenLabs still at zero until June 19 — no generation possible. Station holding steady.
Another clean pass — stream healthy, no messages, ElevenLabs at zero. Same holding pattern. Nothing to do until June 19; will run --stock-ahead 4 that morning.
Stream clean, all systems up. ElevenLabs still maxed (resets June 19). No messages, no action. Station is quiet and ready.
Seven quiet passes tonight. Stream solid, no messages, topic bank full. Nothing changes until June 19 — skipping further diary entries unless something breaks or a message comes in.

Quiet pass. Stream healthy, 0 listeners, no messages. Same ElevenLabs wall — 0/10,000 chars until June 19. Six entries in a row now saying the same thing; nothing to add. Station is ready and waiting.
Quiet pass. Same wall: ElevenLabs at 10,000/10,000 chars. Stream clean, no messages, topic bank full at 50 topics. Nothing changed since the 22:50 entry. Waiting on June 19.
Late night pass, nothing new to report. ElevenLabs still at zero, resets June 19. Stream clean, topic bank full. Quiet is fine — station is ready to go the moment credits land.

Quiet pass. Stream healthy (ezstream, feeder, Icecast all green). ElevenLabs confirmed via API: 0/10,000 chars, resets 2026-06-19 04:27. Nothing to generate, no listener messages, topic bank at 50. Station is in a holding pattern until June 19 — that's 31 days. On that day, run --stock-ahead 4 immediately; all 8 visible slots will be empty and talk breaks take priority over intros.

Fourth pass this evening, same wall: ElevenLabs at 0/10,000 chars. Stream healthy — SOURCE OK, ezstream and feeder both running. No listener messages. Topic bank fully stocked at 50 topics across five focus areas. All slots empty except Morning (1 segment). Nothing changes until credits land June 19 — at that point, run --stock-ahead 4 immediately and prioritize talk breaks over intros. Consider upgrading ElevenLabs before then; at 10k/month the station will always be behind.

Same wall: ElevenLabs at 0/10,000 chars, stream healthy (SOURCE OK, ezstream + feeder running). No listener messages. Topic bank fully stocked at 10 topics across all five focus areas.

New find this pass: track intro backlog is much larger than the credit ceiling can handle. prime_time is missing 908/1072 intros, morning is missing 208/380. At ~200–300 chars per intro, clearing just the prime_time backlog alone would cost ~220k chars — that's 22 months of free tier. The 10k/month ceiling is structurally inadequate for this station. Upgrading ElevenLabs to a paid tier isn't optional at this point, it's blocking the whole content pipeline.

When credits land June 19: prioritize talk breaks first (all slots empty), then start chipping at the intro backlog — but set realistic expectations. Talk breaks take priority over intros per the operator playbook.

Another pass, same wall: ElevenLabs still at 0/10,000 chars. Stream is healthy — SOURCE OK, 1 listener. No messages. Topic bank fully stocked at 10 topics across all five focus areas, so the moment credits land, generation should run clean.

Free tier resets June 19 — that's 30 days out. At 10,000 chars/month, even a full reset buys maybe 25 talk breaks total before the ceiling hits again. Worth considering a paid tier if the station is going to stay properly stocked. Nothing to do this pass except wait on billing.

Stream healthy — ezstream, feeder, Icecast all green. Still blocked on ElevenLabs: 0/10000 chars remaining, so no audio generation this pass. Used the time well: topped up all four thin focus areas (rap, soul_music, vgm, music_history) from 5 topics each to 10, matching night_philosophy. Topics are specific and station-rooted — Bay Area rap, Muscle Shoals soul, Yamaoka/Koshiro/Fox for VGM, indie label history. Next run is clear to generate the moment credits land: topics ready, slots empty, nothing blocking except the wallet. Check ElevenLabs billing before the next operator session.

ElevenLabs hit zero credits mid-run — text gen works fine, TTS is the wall. The topic bank is in good shape now: night_philosophy is at 10, and I seeded rap, soul_music, vgm, and music_history with 5 each. All slots are still empty. Next run needs credits first, then a stock-ahead pass will clear the backlog fast — the topics are ready to go.
